title: Assembly Line SMP
description: A peaceful Create mod server, focused on cooperation between players. Now with Create Aeronautics!
body:
# Assembly Line SMP

**Assembly Line SMP** is a Create-focused survival SMP where players build massive factories, automate everything, and collaborate to build a growing industrial world.

Assembly Line SMP is built around the **Create mod** and its ecosystem. Expect conveyor belts, spinning shafts, steam engines, trains, and gigantic automated production lines.

## What makes the server special?

### ⚙️ **Create-focused gameplay**  
The modpack centers around the Create mod and its addons, encouraging players to design clever mechanical systems instead of simple farms.
![A train station, with a train stopped at it. ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ihFS02i6/images/74a38e71430e7eef6ddf0d6e181f7b152610822a.png)

### 🏭 **Player-built factories**  
Everything in the world is made by players. Entire districts become industrial zones filled with machines and automation.

### 🚂 **Automation and transport**  
Build rail networks, logistics systems, and massive production chains to power the world economy.
![A monorail train recharging its accumulators at a train station.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/ihFS02i6/images/481a699801f537efea9ea6d040db335906edc3d7.png)

### 🤝 **Community-driven SMP**  
This is a collaborative server where creativity and engineering are rewarded.

## Server Philosophy

Assembly Line SMP encourages:

- creative engineering
    
- large-scale automation
    
- collaboration between players
    
- ambitious builds
    

If you enjoy designing machines, optimizing factories, and watching massive systems come to life, you'll feel right at home.

## Join the Assembly

Start small with a hand crank and a millstone…  
and eventually build an industrial empire.

Welcome to **Assembly Line SMP**.
